title: Arduino Robotics: Build Your First Physical Robot
subtitle: From a ₹2,000 kit to a robot that navigates your room.
description: Go hands-on. Wire real circuits, write real code, and build a robot that senses, thinks, and moves through your environment. Covers Arduino fundamentals, sensor integration, motor control, and navigation algorithms — entirely project-driven.
what_youll_learn: Set up and program an Arduino Uno from scratch
Wire real ultrasonic, IR, and servo sensors correctly every time
Control DC motors with an L298N motor driver
Write autonomous navigation code with obstacle avoidance
Debug wiring and code problems methodically
Build a robot that maps and navigates a real room
Understand voltage, current, and power limits that protect your hardware
Structure Arduino projects with clean, readable code
waitlist_cta: Get early access when Wire launches
